# CloudOps Works Agent Skills [![Latest Release](https://img.shields.io/github/release/cloudopsworks/claude-code-skills.svg?style=for-the-badge)](https://github.com/cloudopsworks/claude-code-skills/releases/latest) [![Last Updated](https://img.shields.io/github/last-commit/cloudopsworks/claude-code-skills.svg?style=for-the-badge)](https://github.com/cloudopsworks/claude-code-skills/commits)


CloudOps Works reusable agent skills for Claude Code, OpenCode, and Codex,
including automated installation helpers and release-oriented workflows.


---

This project is part of our comprehensive approach towards DevOps Acceleration.

It's 100% Open Source and licensed under the [APACHE2](LICENSE).












## Introduction

This repository packages CloudOps Works skills as portable automation units for
supported coding agents.

The repository is designed around a YAML-first documentation workflow:
`README.yaml` is the maintained source of truth, while `README.md` is generated
from it.

Current packaged skills include:

| Skill | Purpose |
|-------|---------|
| `cw-release` | Release workflow for repositories using GitVersion GitFlow or GitHubFlow semantics |
| `cw-readme` | YAML-first README maintenance workflow for CloudOps Works repositories |

## Usage



Install all discovered CloudOps Works skills everywhere:

```bash
./scripts/install-cloudopsworks-skills.sh
```

Install only one skill:

```bash
./scripts/install-cloudopsworks-skills.sh --skill cw-release
```

Install multiple selected skills:

```bash
./scripts/install-cloudopsworks-skills.sh --skill cw-release --skill cw-readme
```

Install only for Codex using copied directories instead of symlinks:

```bash
./scripts/install-cloudopsworks-skills.sh --target codex --mode copy
```

Upgrade all installed skills:

```bash
./scripts/upgrade-cloudopsworks-skills.sh
```

Default install locations:

- Claude Code: `~/.claude/skills/<skill>`
- OpenCode: `~/.config/opencode/commands/<skill>/<skill>.md`
- Codex: `~/.codex/skills/<skill>`

Optional environment overrides:

- `CLAUDE_CODE_HOME`
- `OPENCODE_HOME`
- `CODEX_HOME`

## Quick Start

1. Clone the repository.
2. Run `./scripts/install-cloudopsworks-skills.sh`.
3. Use `/cw-release` for release automation.
4. Use `/cw-readme` when maintaining YAML-first documentation.
5. When repository documentation changes, update `README.yaml` first and run `make readme` last.


## Examples

Invoke the release workflow in a compatible agent after installation:

```text
/cw-release
```

Invoke the README maintenance workflow:

```text
/cw-readme
```

Backward-compatible single-skill installer wrappers remain available:

```bash
./scripts/install-cw-release.sh
./scripts/upgrade-cw-release.sh
```



## Makefile Targets
```
Available targets:

  help                                Help screen
  help/all                            Display help for all targets
  help/short                          This help short screen

```
